No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) providing communication skills and fostering cultural understanding, aligning with Target 4.7 for knowledge and appreciation of cultural diversity.
evidence: 具備一般日語溝通能力
透過日語的學習幫助學生瞭解日本的文化、習慣等

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides 'general Japanese communication skills,' which are relevant skills for employment, indirectly supporting Target 8.5 on productive employment.
evidence: 具備一般日語溝通能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Learning about 'Japanese culture, habits, etc.' can foster intercultural understanding, a very indirect link to promoting social inclusion (Target 10.2).
evidence: 透過日語的學習幫助學生瞭解日本的文化、習慣等

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to sustainable cities and communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and use legitimate textbooks promotes the rule of law (Target 16.3).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Learning Japanese language and culture fosters international understanding, a foundational element for global partnerships and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
